task_completion.description: Create or select a bone segmentation mask
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the InVesalius 3 interface, a segmentation mask corresponding to bone density is selected, created, or visible in the masks list.

task_completion.description: Create a 3D surface model from the bone mask
task_completion.visual_evidence: A 3D surface model of the skull is rendered and visible in the 3D viewer pane of InVesalius 3.

task_completion.description: Export the Anterior view (Norma Frontalis) of the skull
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 3D skull model is oriented facing forward (Anterior view) and centered in the viewer. A save dialog or export action is visible saving the image to '/home/ga/Documents/norma_frontalis.png'.

task_completion.description: Export the Right Lateral view (Norma Lateralis) of the skull
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 3D skull model is oriented showing its right side (Right Lateral view) and centered in the viewer. A save dialog or export action is visible saving the image to '/home/ga/Documents/norma_lateralis.png'.

task_completion.description: Export the Inferior view (Norma Basilaris) of the skull
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 3D skull model is oriented showing the bottom (Inferior view) and centered in the viewer. A save dialog or export action is visible saving the image to '/home/ga/Documents/norma_basilaris.png'.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the InVesalius 3 GUI to create the model and export the views
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the agent clicking through the InVesalius 3 menus, 3D viewer controls, and export dialogs, rather than using a terminal script to generate the images.

integrity.description: The exported images are generated from the actual 3D model in InVesalius 3
integrity.visual_evidence: The 3D viewer shows the skull model matching the exported views, rather than the agent downloading or copying pre-existing images from the internet or other folders.

integrity.description: The agent actually oriented the 3D model to the correct anatomical views before exporting
integrity.visual_evidence: The 3D viewer clearly shows the distinct Anterior, Right Lateral, and Inferior views prior to or during the export process, rather than saving the exact same view multiple times with different filenames.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The task requires generating three distinct PNG files in /home/ga/Documents/: 'norma_frontalis.png' (Anterior/Front view), 'norma_lateralis.png' (Right Lateral/Side view), and 'norma_basilaris.png' (Inferior/Bottom view). Each file must be larger than 30KB. The dataset used is 'ct_cranium/0051'.
